topTargets.name: Jordyn Tyson
topTargets.reasoning: Consensus name with MFL ADP 12.71 — exactly the kind of big-name WR a low-RSP-affinity GM chases at 1.13. Fills the thin WR room (only 6) and his industry buzz outweighs RSP's boom-bust warning for this owner.

topTargets.name: KC Concepcion
topTargets.reasoning: MFL ADP 13.57 makes him a name-brand pick around 1.13, and the dual flanker/slot/return profile is a household-name path. Low-RSP GM grabs the consensus WR over RSP's sleeper picks.

topTargets.name: Malachi Fields
topTargets.reasoning: Notre Dame size-speed prospect with a Nico Collins comp — fits the chase-the-name profile. Addresses the WR depth gap behind a heavy RB room (8 RBs vs 6 WRs).

topTargets.name: Kenyon Sadiq
topTargets.reasoning: MFL ADP 13.11 with Brock Bowers comp and viral combine numbers — pure name-driven appeal. TE room is just 2 deep, so the positional need lines up if Tyson/Concepcion/Fields are all gone at 1.13.

topTargets.name: Denzel Boston
topTargets.reasoning: ADP 16.11 lands him squarely at 2.13 value. Big-school Washington WR with a clean profile — exactly the consensus name a low-RSP GM takes in round 2 over RSP sleepers like Brazzell or Sarratt.

capPosture: Tight at $41.9M of $45M used with only $3.1M space and 8 expiring contracts; rookie cap hits will mostly need to land on the taxi until cuts and expirations open the active roster.

wildcard.name: Fernando Mendoza
wildcard.reasoning: Top consensus QB (MFL ADP 11.39, RSP QB1) with the kind of national name a low-RSP-affinity GM finds hard to pass on if he slides to 1.13. QB room is already 3 deep, so it's a luxury reach driven by name recognition rather than need.

summary: Da Dangsters draft from a tight-cap, RB-heavy, WR-thin roster and lean on consensus ADP rather than RSP sleepers. Expect a name-brand WR (Tyson, Concepcion, or Fields) at 1.13, with 2.13 and 3.13 used to keep stacking pass-catchers — Boston in round 2 and another mid-ADP WR/TE in round 3. Most rookies will start on taxi to manage the $3.1M of cap headroom.
